ate in a range of listening assessments based on patient consultations and lectures. Reading Read and understand different types of texts based on a variety of healthcare professions and subjects. ecifically for 12 healthcare professions. Who recognises the OET Test? Regulators, hospitals & universities in the UK, the US, Ireland, Australia, New Zealand, Dubai and Singapore recognise and trust the OET Test as proof of ability to communicate effectively. Assessment structure Listening Participate in a range of listeni

ively with patients, colleagues and healthcare teams. Backed by research, built from research Our test is underpinned by ongoing research from leading academic institutions, including Cambridge Assessment English and the University of Melbourne.The reliability of the Listening and Reading sub-tests is reported using Cronbach Alpha
